creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
While playing Patience (kpat), I decided to change the decks backside.  While looking thru the different decks, I didn't find a deck for FreeBSD, but I did find Tux (Penguin) deck.

Fix: 

I downloaded the FreeBSD logo from http://www.freebsd.org/logo.html, and created a FreeBSD deck.

To uses this deck with kdegames you need to apply patch-kdegames3 to the games/kdegames3 port, as well as extract deck_freebsd.{desktop,png} from freebsd_deck.tgz to games/kdegames3/files directory.

By defining WITH_FREEBSD_DECK, the port will install this new deck.  If WITHOUT_TUX is defined as well, then the Tux (Penguin) deck will be replaced by the FreeBSD deck.

Apply the patches and files from the follow-up E-Mail.
How-To-Repeat: Run Patience (kpat) and then look for a deck with a FreeBSD theme.
